spec_corrigenda_surfaced_in_w3.claim: Spec §4 unit 2 STRAND disjunction 5-tuple ordering and naming is informal; lean4 inductive constructors require fixed order
spec_corrigenda_surfaced_in_w3.evidence: Spec lists {amino_acid_sequence, rna_sequence, small_ligand, dna_sequence, antibody} which is not the alphabetical/biological canonical order; lean4 file uses {aminoAcid, rna, dna, smallLigand, antibody} for closer alignment with biological hierarchy

spec_corrigenda_surfaced_in_w3.claim: Spec §4 unit 2 strategy '∃ STRAND, IsClass STRAND' was assumed compatible with mathlib4; W1 audit confirmed MK absence; W3 confirms structural gap

spec_corrigenda_surfaced_in_w3.recommended_amendment: Spec §4 unit 2 should explicitly state W3 deliverable scope = lean4 surrogate only, with MK bridge deferred to W4-W5 (already implicit, but make explicit)

raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure: sorry count is 2 in delivered file. Both are intentional placeholders for STRUCTURAL gaps (MK class-theory bridge; HEXA-COMP closure). No hidden sorry, no admit. 11 of 13 theorems carry zero sorry.

AX2_strand_is_MK_class is the load-bearing structural sorry — without it, the Spec §4 unit 2 statement 'STRAND is an MK proper class' is unproven. Honest claim: 'Strand lean4 inductive type DEFINED, 5 constructors EXHIBITED, lean4 Set Strand-level class non-empty PROVED, but MK class-theory bridge UNMECHANIZED'. NOT thm.AX2_strand_class_well_formed PROVED in T_MK-HW.

AX2_strand_closed_under_HEXAComp is a secondary structural sorry surfaced because Spec §4 unit 2 demands closure under HEXA-COMP but HEXA-COMP itself is not yet mechanized. Discharge plan: define HEXA-COMP operator in W6+ together with AX-3.

biology semantics encoding limit: inductive constructors take List AminoAcid / List RNANucleotide / String payloads with NO biological-validity predicate. Real ribosome can produce List [Ala, Stop, Trp, ...] which is not a valid translation product but the lean4 type accepts it. Deliberate abstraction — option (b) chosen over (a) precisely because biological-validity is OUT OF SCOPE for AX-2 well-formedness.

opaque predicates auditable: IsMKProperClass and ClosedUnderHEXAComp are opaque (no canonical body); lean4's elaborator cannot silently inhabit them. The two sorrys are therefore visible at every kernel check.

lake build ran on production user's Mac M2 (mission §safety jetsam concern). 10.0 s warm-cache; mathlib cache hit; no SIGKILL observed. 351 jobs (lighter than W2's 1310 because AX2 imports only Mathlib.Data.Set.Basic).
No new dependencies added; no lake update invoked; no toolchain change required.
W3 nominal window is 2026-05-19 → 2026-06-01; this delivery is on day -21 (early by 3 weeks; running ahead with carryover from W1+W2 early-start).

F-W1-1.evidence: Set, Set.univ, Set.mem_univ, Set.Nonempty all elaborate cleanly under v4.30.0-rc1 + mathlib master 19c4978; AX2.lean compiles in 10.0s

F-W1-2.evidence: three new Spec corrigenda surfaced in W3: (1) HEXA-COMP forward-reference; (2) STRAND disjunct ordering; (3) MK-bridge scope clarification. Total count: W1 6 + W2 2 + W3 3 = 11.

F-W1-3.evidence: MK absence in mathlib4 is now load-bearing — AX2_strand_is_MK_class carries explicit sorry; no in-lean4 path to discharge without W4-W5 work. F-W1-3 prediction realized at MEDIUM severity (predicted: MEDIUM).
